# Generated conformance fixtures

Fixtures in this directory are generated by the GAS RATIO PRO test suite from
synthetic byte sequences. They do not contain vendor data, copied field data,
or redistributed standard documents. They may be regenerated and distributed
under the project license.

Covered contracts: SEG-Y textual/binary headers, trace-header byte mapping,
and bounded DLIS/LIS79 adapter-unavailable probes.
